description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the postgres:14 Docker image as the default image. Include the .gitlab/job_templates/doc.yml template which defines a doc job in the lint stage, and the .gitlab/job_templates/smoke_tests.yml template which defines a smoke_tests job in the test stage. Include the .gitlab/job_templates/build_and_test_pgver.yml template five times with inputs pgver set to pg14, pg15, pg16, pg17 and pg18, creating five jobs named build_and_test_pgver_pg14, build_and_test_pgver_pg15, build_and_test_pgver_pg16, build_and_test_pgver_pg17 and build_and_test_pgver_pg18 that run the template's build script (e.g., make && make install) and test script (e.g., pg_regress) in the build and test stages respectively. Include the Security/SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template which adds a sast job in the test stage, and the .gitlab/job_templates/coverage.yml template with pgver pg17 which adds a coverage job in the test stage that runs coverage collection commands. Also include dalibo/.gitlab-ci.yml only if that file exists, adding its defined jobs. Define the stages lint, build, test, deploy and release. Configure the workflow so the pipeline runs on merge‑request events, is skipped when a branch has open merge requests, and otherwise runs on any branch commit or tag.
